body:
Fixes #439.

## Summary
- add the browser worker parity handler for dimensionally incompatible measurement units
- extend Russian unit seed forms for meter, kilogram, and gram case variants
- add Rust and Playwright regressions for `Сколько метров в килограмме?` plus multilingual length/mass variations

## Reproduction
Ask the wasm-worker demo: `Сколько метров в килограмме?`

Before this change, the browser worker fell through to `intent:unknown`. After this change it returns `intent:unit_incompatibility` and explains that meters measure length while kilograms measure mass.

## Tests
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs`
- `cargo test`
- `node --check src/web/formal_ai_worker.js`
- `npm --prefix tests/e2e run check:web-tdz`
- `npm --prefix tests/e2e run check:intent-coverage`
- `npm --prefix tests/e2e run check:language-test-coverage`
- `scripts/sync-seed.sh --check`
- `(cd tests/e2e && npx playwright test --config=playwright.local.config.js tests/issue-439.spec.js)`

And cover much variety of requests in natural language by actually using meanings.
